Global Variable# kCTTabColumnTerminatorsAttributeName

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTTabColumnTerminatorsAttributeName: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CoreText/kcttabcolumnterminatorsattributename#Discussion)

Specifies the terminating character for a tab column.
